changes.summary: No longer required in configuration; now optional and computed from the flow file after a successful apply.
Accepts Amazon S3 URIs (s3://) in addition to local paths and HTTP(S) URLs.
Plan and apply emit a warning when file_content_hash is still set in configuration, noting it will become read-only in a future release.
Bulk export omits file_content_hash from exported .tf configuration; the hash is written to exported state only.
Optional and computed prompt text for generating guide content when source is Prompt.
Optional and computed file URL for generating guide content when source is Prompt.
Documentation clarifies that prompt or url is required when source is Prompt.
Documentation clarifies API values Draft and ProductionReady.
Create runs a content-generation job and creates an initial guide version when source is Prompt; other sources also receive an initial guide version on create.
Read refreshes status and source from the API and sets latest_saved_version and latest_production_ready_version to null when the API returns no version.
Create updates the latest saved version instead of failing when the API returns HTTP 409 because the latest version is not Production Ready.
Flow lookup by name retries for up to 30 seconds (previously 5 seconds) before returning an error.
